failures.title: Audit crashed
failures.description: WebDriverError: Failed to fetch when running "execute/async" with method "POST"

findings.title: Global search was not surfaced during audit
findings.evidence: Cross-feature discovery becomes harder when students must manually browse every module.
findings.recommendation: Keep search persistent in the shell and expose quick actions for lessons, mocks, and live classes.

findings.title: Information hierarchy should prioritize student actions over raw density
findings.evidence: Dashboard, analytics, and practice surfaces contain many cards and metrics competing for attention.
findings.recommendation: Lead each screen with one primary action, one progress summary, and move secondary metrics below the fold.

findings.title: The product would benefit from calmer visual grouping
findings.evidence: Many surfaces use similarly weighted cards, making it harder to distinguish primary vs secondary information.
findings.recommendation: Use quieter containers for supporting information, stronger section spacing, and one accent surface per screen.
